title: LSML 1.0 — http_poll adapter
description: Periodic HTTP/HTTPS GET against `url`; the JSON response is merged into the leaf-state under `writes_to`. Server-side execution.

url.description: Absolute HTTP or HTTPS URL. ws:// and other schemes are forbidden.

writes_to.description: LeafPath prefix the response merges into. The adapter MUST NOT write outside this prefix.

interval_ms.description: Poll period in milliseconds. Servers SHOULD enforce a floor (default 100 ms) to prevent abuse.

from_secret.description: Secret name resolved by the server-side secret store (NOT the secret value).

merge_strategy.description: `replace` overwrites every leaf under writes_to. `merge` only updates paths present in the response (preserves untouched leaves).
